name: La Pasion XR
publisher: Agile Lens, LLC., Gateway Chamber Orchestra
short_description: “La Pasión XR" takes guests on an ephemeral, audio-reactive journey through the Gateway Chamber Orchestra’s Spring 2023 performance of Osvaldo Golijov's La Pasion según San Marcos.
detailed_description:
Step into the world of Osvaldo Golijov's “La Pasión segun San Marcos ” re-imagined in XR for the release of the "Live at 25" live recording by Gateway Chamber Orchestra and Chorale and Summit Records.

Set in a 3D point cloud theater environment, “La Pasión XR ” brings visitors to an ephemeral, audio-reactive concert experience where they are free to explore a showcase of powerful volumetric and 360 stereo recordings of the Gateway Chamber Orchestra in Clarksville, TN.

In Spring of 2023, the ensemble performed a limited run of the landmark work by composer Osvaldo Golijov - “La Pasión segun San Marcos ” (2000) and the team of technologists at Agile Lens were invited to create a cinematic experience that brings the piece to life in virtual space for all to experience. Using methods like volumetric capture and 3D scanning, the creators have made a world where anyone can get incredible seats to witness the choreography, or examine some of the unique instrumentation rarely performed outside of Latin America.
